gaps.description: src/store/index.js exists but agentic-store abstraction is not documented in ARCHITECTURE.md
src/tunnel.js exists but tunnel capability is not mentioned in ARCHITECTURE.md
src/cli/ (setup.js, browser.js) exists but CLI module is not defined in ARCHITECTURE.md
src/server/cert.js, httpsServer.js, middleware.js exist but HTTPS/middleware layer is not in ARCHITECTURE.md
src/runtime/vad.js exists but VAD is not mentioned in ARCHITECTURE.md
src/runtime/embed.js and adapters/ exist but agentic-embed runtime integration is not described in ARCHITECTURE.md
src/detector/matcher.js and ollama.js exist but are not listed in detector module section of ARCHITECTURE.md
All core modules (detector, runtime, server, ui, bin, profiles, install) defined in ARCHITECTURE.md are present
